args: $ErrorActionPreference = "Stop"; $pluginDll = "${config:embyPluginDllPath}"; $destDir = Split-Path $pluginDll -Parent; $srcDll = "${workspaceFolder}/Emby.Plugin.AnimeThemesSync/bin/Debug/net8.0/Emby.Plugin.AnimeThemesSync.dll"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $destDir -Force | Out-Null; Copy-Item $srcDll -Destination $pluginDll -Force; if (-not (Test-Path $pluginDll)) { throw "Missing plugin after copy: $pluginDll" }

$targets = Get-Process -Name EmbyServer, embytray -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; foreach ($p in $targets) { try { Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force -ErrorAction Stop } catch { Write-Warning ("Could not stop process {0} (PID {1}). Continuing." -f $p.ProcessName, $p.Id) } }; exit 0

Write-Host ""; Write-Host "===== Build Outputs =====" -ForegroundColor Cyan; $jf = "${workspaceFolder}/Jellyfin.Plugin.AnimeThemesSync/bin/Debug/net9.0/Jellyfin.Plugin.AnimeThemesSync.dll"; $emby = "${workspaceFolder}/Emby.Plugin.AnimeThemesSync/bin/Debug/net8.0/Emby.Plugin.AnimeThemesSync.dll"; $shared = "${workspaceFolder}/AnimeThemesSync.Shared/bin/Debug/netstandard2.1/AnimeThemesSync.Shared.dll"; Write-Host ("[Shared ] " + $shared); Write-Host ("[Jellyfin] " + $jf); Write-Host ("[Emby   ] " + $emby); Write-Host ""; Write-Host "===== Deploy Target =====" -ForegroundColor Cyan; Write-Host ("[Jellyfin Testy] ${config:jellyfinTestyDataDir}/plugins/${config:pluginName}"); Write-Host ("[Emby DLL ] ${config:embyPluginDllPath}");

echo; echo '===== Build Outputs ====='; echo '[Shared ] ${workspaceFolder}/AnimeThemesSync.Shared/bin/Debug/netstandard2.1/AnimeThemesSync.Shared.dll'; echo '[Jellyfin] ${workspaceFolder}/Jellyfin.Plugin.AnimeThemesSync/bin/Debug/net9.0/Jellyfin.Plugin.AnimeThemesSync.dll'; echo '[Emby   ] ${workspaceFolder}/Emby.Plugin.AnimeThemesSync/bin/Debug/net8.0/Emby.Plugin.AnimeThemesSync.dll'; echo; echo '===== Deploy Target ====='; echo '[Jellyfin Linux] ${config:jellyfinLinuxDataDir}/plugins/${config:pluginName}'; echo '[Emby DLL ] ${config:embyPluginDllPath}'

$pluginsRoot = "${config:jellyfinTestyDataDir}/plugins"; $src = "${workspaceFolder}/Jellyfin.Plugin.AnimeThemesSync/bin/Debug/net9.0/Jellyfin.Plugin.AnimeThemesSync.dll"; $versioned = Get-ChildItem $pluginsRoot -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -like 'AnimeThemesSync_*' } | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 1; if ($versioned) { $dest = $versioned.FullName } else { $dest = Join-Path $pluginsRoot "${config:pluginName}"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $dest -Force | Out-Null }; Copy-Item $src -Destination (Join-Path $dest "Jellyfin.Plugin.AnimeThemesSync.dll") -Force; Write-Host ("Copied to: " + $dest)
